environment_runtime: Craftax via Modal-hosted Synth-compatible Craftax core runtime service
training_backend: Custom sequence-level GRPO-style LoRA loop in src/nanohorizon/rlvr_training.py
inference_backend: Clustered Modal vLLM runtime forwarded from the learner-owned rank-1 worker
reproducibility: Reference runner is ./scripts/run_craftax_rlvr_qwen35_4b_2xa100_20min.sh with user edits confined to src/nanohorizon/rlvr_training.py.
